title: Roman Armor
description: Roman Armor Mod adds Armors that is based on Roman Army - The Roman army was the armed forces deployed by the Romans throughout the duration of Ancient Rome. MABUHAY!!!
body:
**Roman Armor Mod adds Armors that is based on Roman Army - The Roman army was the armed forces deployed by the Romans throughout the duration of Ancient Rome.**


+ can be enchanted.

+ added protection

+ can be crafted

+ can deal additional damage

+ additional trade from villagers
+ 2 new types of villager profession 

+ compatible with Villager Recruits mod

+ new materials to craft Armors, Weapons and Villager Block

  - leather string 

  - plate

  - chain


**AWARDS**

+ military diploma

+ golden gladius

+ baton

+ aquila

+ vexillum (legio I)

 

**WEAPON **

+ gladius

+ mainz gladius

+ pompeii gladius

+ pilum

 

**ARMOR**

+ legionnaire armor

+ aquilifer armor

+ option armor

+ centurion armor

+ legatus armor

+ consul armor

+ praetorian centuriones armor

+ praetorian milites armor

 
**NOTE**
You can now craft saddle,leather horse armor and iron horse armor

 
Support Me by donating in my patreon : Patreon.com/SpartacusMods

 

**This mod is for simple people, not looking to add too much but wanting to change up the game's armors and weapons a bit.**
